info.title: Neuwerk HTTP API
info.description: OpenAPI document for the Neuwerk control-plane management API.

200.description: Accepted token and created browser session

400.description: Invalid request or policy compile failure

503.description: Activation wait failed or leader unknown

204.description: Disabled service account and revoked tokens

404.description: TLS intercept CA is not configured

200.description: Generated and persisted TLS intercept CA
